calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: L. Norris, Clerk: A. Huie, Reporter: D. Neville. Donald Edward Bloom appeared on behalf of plaintiff, defendant Philip Eastman appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held, not reported. Parties reached an agreement, terms of settlement on record. Trial date of AUG-19-2002 vacated. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare an order for Court's signature.
